calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Anthony J. Dipiero of Hunt & Henriques (408-362-2295) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff, Citibank

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Chiu M. Ng is off calendar without prejudice to filing an application for return of funds. The plaintiff did not file a timely opposition with the Sheriff's office.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
